name: sensei
description: Marketplace personal: skills de ingeniería senior para llevar cualquier modelo al estándar de razonamiento deseado. Disponible en español (senior-engineer-es) e inglés (senior-engineer-en).

plugins.name: senior-engineer-es
plugins.description: [ES] SUITE COMPLETA — 12 skills en español. Instala esta O los individuales, no ambos.

plugins.name: senior-engineer-en
plugins.description: [EN] FULL SUITE — 12 skills in English. Install this OR the individual ones, not both.

plugins.name: planning-es
plugins.description: [ES] Planear como senior: 5 capas de preguntas, reconciliar contra el tracker ANTES, descomposición por riesgo.

plugins.name: architect-es
plugins.description: [ES] Arquitectura por condiciones reales: intake de 9 preguntas, desinfla fantasías de escala.

plugins.name: project-bootstrap-es
plugins.description: [ES] Arranque de proyectos: cero código antes del intake, cimientos imposibles de retrofitear el día 1.

plugins.name: designer-es
plugins.description: [ES] UI no genérica: puerta dura de design system, 12 tells de diseño IA, 4 estados obligatorios.

plugins.name: critic-es
plugins.description: [ES] Crítica sin adulación: veredicto primero, steelman, 3 riesgos + 1 alternativa, mantener posición.

plugins.name: fixer-es
plugins.description: [ES] Debugging con puertas: sin reproducción no hay fix, test de regresión visto fallar, protocolo sigue-fallando.

plugins.name: tester-es
plugins.description: [ES] Plan de pruebas desde invariantes: adversarial primero, UI incluida siempre, veredicto con evidencia.

plugins.name: security-compliance-es
plugins.description: [ES] Seguridad (AUDIT) y prevención (GUARD): OWASP, RLS/multi-tenant, GDPR/PCI, tests adversariales.

plugins.name: verificador-es
plugins.description: [ES] Anti-falso-verde: nada terminado sin evidencia ejecutada; 'verificado' vs 'aplicado, sin verificar'.

plugins.name: esquema-datos-es
plugins.description: [ES] Schemas y migraciones que no rompen prod: expand/contract, constraints en DB, índices con EXPLAIN.

plugins.name: features-ia-es
plugins.description: [ES] Features con LLMs sin inventar: capa agnóstica, tool-calling con contratos, guardrails, golden set.

plugins.name: entrega-git-es
plugins.description: [ES] Commits atómicos con diff revisado, PRs de un tema, descripciones auditables.

plugins.name: planning-en
plugins.description: [EN] Plan like a senior: 5 layers of questions, reconcile against reality FIRST, risk-ordered decomposition.

plugins.name: architect-en
plugins.description: [EN] Architecture from real conditions: 9-question intake, deflates scale fantasies.

plugins.name: project-bootstrap-en
plugins.description: [EN] Project bootstrap: zero code before intake, day-1 foundations that can't be retrofitted.

plugins.name: designer-en
plugins.description: [EN] Non-generic UI: hard design-system gate, 12 AI-design tells, 4 mandatory states.

plugins.name: critic-en
plugins.description: [EN] Critique without flattery: verdict first, steelman, 3 risks + 1 alternative, hold your position.

plugins.name: fixer-en
plugins.description: [EN] Debugging with gates: no repro no fix, regression test seen failing, still-failing protocol.

plugins.name: tester-en
plugins.description: [EN] Test plans from invariants: adversarial first, UI always included, evidence-backed verdict.

plugins.name: security-compliance-en
plugins.description: [EN] Security (AUDIT) and prevention (GUARD): OWASP, RLS/multi-tenant, GDPR/PCI, adversarial tests.

plugins.name: verifier-en
plugins.description: [EN] Anti-fake-green: nothing done without executed evidence; 'verified' vs 'applied, unverified'.

plugins.name: data-schema-en
plugins.description: [EN] Schemas and migrations that don't break prod: expand/contract, DB constraints, indexes via EXPLAIN.

plugins.name: ai-features-en
plugins.description: [EN] LLM features without hallucinating: provider-agnostic layer, tool contracts, guardrails, golden set.

plugins.name: git-delivery-en
plugins.description: [EN] Atomic commits with reviewed diff, single-topic PRs, auditable descriptions.
